summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Biryani Leaf cloud kitchen website. All requested features are working correctly. The hero carousel displays menu items with autoplay, header navigation scrolls to correct sections, phone numbers show without extra spaces, bulk order button triggers phone animation, and mobile responsive layout is functional.

issues: QR Code shows placeholder instead of actual QR - likely intentional for preview

tests_passed: Header navigation: About, Menu, Order, Contact - all scroll to correct sections
Header phone number: 8804081857 displayed without extra spaces
Header Order Now button: scrolls to order section
Hero carousel: displays 5 menu items (Chicken Dum Biryani, Veg Biryani, Chicken 65, Tikka Butter Masala, Chicken Chilli)
Carousel navigation arrows: appear on hover and navigate correctly
Menu filter tabs: All, Veg, Non-Veg - all filter correctly
Menu items: display with images, prices, serving sizes, and tags
Call Now for Bulk Orders button: scrolls to contact section
Phone animation: wiggle animation CSS present and triggers on bulk order click
Contact section phone numbers: 8804081857 & 8287767107 (no extra spaces)
WhatsApp button: correctly configured to open wa.me/918804081857
Mobile responsive: sticky Order Now button visible at bottom
Mobile: header navigation collapses appropriately (hidden on mobile)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper use of React hooks, embla-carousel, and Tailwind CSS
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Animation CSS properly defined in App.css for wiggle effect
seed_data_creation: None needed - all data hardcoded in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Hero carousel uses embla-carousel-react with 3.5s autoplay delay. Phone numbers formatted correctly. Mobile sticky button works. WhatsApp links to wa.me/918804081857. All navigation and filter tabs functional.
